reason: Goal status, facts, achievement, milestone suggestion and UI span database, service, API and frontend boundaries.
Reuse the existing schedule investment projection and centralize shared status/evidence contracts.
Achievement cards, evidence drawer and Agent/event-linked UI must preserve component and accessibility behavior.
Goal lifecycle, summary, achievement and suggestion payloads require aligned runtime and TypeScript contracts.
Verified current goal progress, milestone and status implementation paths.
Real database aggregate used to define reusable achievement modules and backfill expectations.
Confirmed readiness removal decision and zero-loss expand-contract migration.
